title: IntuneRosetta Policy Contribution
description: Schema for a contribution file — a JSON array of policy records to add to the IntuneRosetta knowledge base.

normalized_key.description: Unique underscore-delimited identifier for this policy record (lowercase, no device_vendor_msft_ prefix). Pattern: ^[a-z0-9_]+$

csp_path.description: Canonical OMA-URI CSP path starting with ./Device/Vendor/MSFT/ or ./User/Vendor/MSFT/

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what this policy controls.

docs_url.description: URL to the official Microsoft documentation for this policy.

value_map.description: Map of raw integer/string values to human-readable labels (e.g. {"0": "Disabled", "1": "Block", "2": "Audit"}).

is_deprecated.description: Set to true when this policy has been superseded. Defaults to false.

replaced_by_csp.description: normalized_key of the replacement record (required when is_deprecated is true).

deprecation_notice.description: Free-text explanation of why this policy is deprecated (date, context, migration guidance).
